title: AgentDoc Migration Report
description: The `adoc migrate` report envelope: PRD §28.3 counts (each diagnostic-backed count reconciles 1:1 with an emitted migrate.* diagnostic), per-file entries, suggested next steps, and every diagnostic the run emitted. Emitted by `adoc migrate --format json`; there is no MCP migrate tool. See ROADMAP-V8.md §V8.1.2 and ADR-0043 §4.

suggested_next_steps.description: One deterministic rule per nonzero count, fixed order; empty when nothing fires.

suggestions.description: PRD §28.4 typed-block candidates (V8.1.3) — report records only, never applied to migrated output. At most one per block, first-match-wins over a fixed rule order; counts.suggested_typed_blocks equals this array's length. Spans keyed by span.file, like diagnostics.

diagnostics.description: Every diagnostic the run emitted, spans included; `span.file` keys a diagnostic to its per-file entry.

pages_created.description: Equal to files_imported — one prose-mode page per source.

prose_blocks.description: Sum of the per-file serialized fragment counts — every rendered block (headings, lists, code and quarantine fences included), not only prose paragraphs.

unrecognized_extensions.description: Tally of migrate.unrecognized_extension diagnostics — quarantined constructs and diagnosed drops (front matter, task-list checkboxes, empty parser artifacts) alike.

suggested_typed_blocks.description: Length of the top-level suggestions array — §28.4 candidates, never auto-applied.

written.description: True only when --write executed; one value across all files (all-or-nothing, ADR-0043 §3).

suggestion.description: One §28.4 candidate: the block a human could type. Rules, not weights — no confidence field, by design.

excerpt.description: First line of the matched plain text, truncated to 120 characters.
